scope: ACL 2027 supplement InternNav media-boundary AI slot-composition iteration

motivation.target_page_before: page 36 was a sparse InternNav media-inventory boundary page with mostly text and a small table
motivation.goal_alignment: Add more navigation/video visual evidence and use the approved AI slot-composer workflow while preserving the claim boundary.

slot_composer.critical_text_policy: Critical labels, row titles, boundary cards, and paper caption are drawn by deterministic code or LaTeX; the AI slot is an abstract exposition component.

local_visual_review.notes: The rendered page has no clipping or caption collision. The first two rows are registered video stills and route overlays; the third row contains the AI media-package gate slot and is explicitly disclosed in the caption. The remaining risk is small in-figure text at PDF scale.

verification.targeted_red: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "navigation_media_boundary_strip" failed before implementation because the figure registry entry was absent.
verification.targeted_green: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "navigation_media_boundary_strip or task_media_atlases" passed: 3 passed, 49 deselected.
verification.build: make -C paper acl27-supplement passed and produced a 43-page A4 supplement.
verification.pdf_text_scan: pdftotext found the new Figure S23 caption and AI-generated schematic disclosure. A separate risk-token scan found no old red-material caption tokens, fig_vlm_grounding_cases, author-identifying tokens, or local path tokens.

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual media-boundary reading guide in the InternNav supplement section
claim_boundary.notes: The AI media-package gate slot is not navigation evidence. The evidence-bearing slots are registered video stills and route panels; the quantitative navigation claim remains tied to the frozen 99-episode official-scene run.
